# Charles Beard | Senior Product Manager

> Senior Product Manager and CFA Charterholder at J.P.Morgan Chase, leading enterprise investment platforms, analytics, and AI-enabled tooling.

Charles Beard is a Senior Product Manager at J.P.Morgan Chase with extensive experience building enterprise investment platforms for global asset management. He holds a CFA designation and an MSc in Computer Science (Distinction) from the University of Bath, where his dissertation applied NLP and machine learning to automate support ticket classification on the Spectrum platform.

## Pages

- [Home](https://charlie-beard.github.io/portfolio/): Senior Product Manager and CFA Charterholder at J.P.Morgan Chase, leading enterprise investment platforms, analytics, and AI-enabled tooling.
- [About](https://charlie-beard.github.io/portfolio/about.html): Professional background, focus areas, and approach to platform product management
- [CV](https://charlie-beard.github.io/portfolio/cv.html): Full career history, education, certifications, and skills
- [DinoClaude](https://charlie-beard.github.io/portfolio/dinoclaude.html): Browser-based endless runner game built for the portfolio

## Case Studies


- [SpectrumIQ](https://charlie-beard.github.io/portfolio/project-spectrumiq-chat.html): AI-enabled chat experience introduced as a strategic core product within Spectrum.

- [Spectrum Design System](https://charlie-beard.github.io/portfolio/project-spectrum-design-system.html): A strategic shared foundation delivering consistent platform experiences across 100+ Spectrum applications.

- [Telemetry and Analytics](https://charlie-beard.github.io/portfolio/project-telemetry-analytics.html): Shared telemetry and analytics capability giving Spectrum products the insight to make better decisions.

- [Help and Support](https://charlie-beard.github.io/portfolio/project-help-support.html): A strategic shared support experience for thousands of Spectrum users across investment, client service, and operations.

- [Dashboards](https://charlie-beard.github.io/portfolio/project-dashboards.html): Shared dashboards delivering clearer portfolio visibility across investment, client service, and operations in Spectrum.

- [MSc Thesis — NLP and ML for Support Ticket Classification](https://charlie-beard.github.io/portfolio/project-msc-thesis.html): Research into automating support ticket classification on JPMorgan's Spectrum platform using natural language processing and machine learning.
